unresolved_gap: Credentialed DRGR portal — operator must export and drop manifests in manual_drop_dir.

PRASA aqueduct/sewer authority. ingest_prasa.py is a dropzone reader (CSV/Excel), not a live scraper - operator delivers exported procurement files to data/raw/PRASA/. Includes Consulting Engineer Report FY2024 baseline. The vendor-level master is now produced by the prasa_contracts_master source (scripts/build_prasa_contracts_master.py).

PR Comptroller (OCPR) audit reports and findings on government entities and contractors. Operator delivers exported CSV/Excel to the dropzone. NOTE the OCPR contract registry (consultacontratos.ocpr.gov.pr) is a separate product still needing a dedicated scraper.
PR Central Office for Recovery, Reconstruction and Resiliency project tracker.
SAM full extract + per-UEI enrichment for parent resolution. Supplemented by scripts/usaspending_parent_uei_extract.py (no rate limit). SAM API rate: 1,000 req/day → full 2,334-UEI run = 2.3+ days.

PR Office of Government Ethics (OEG) state-level lobbyist (cabildero) registry. ingest_cabilderos.py is a dropzone reader (CSV/Excel), not a live scraper - operator delivers the OEG export to data/raw/Cabilderos/. Cross-references cabildero clients with federal award recipients to surface dual-influence entities.

PR State Election Commission (CEE/CEEPUR) state-level donation registry. ingest_donaciones.py is a dropzone reader for operator-delivered CEE CSV exports — no network code. Previously mislabeled as using ingest_fec.py (federal FEC) with a wrong output path. Cross-references federal FEC via analyze_political_crossref.py.
Aggregate toll revenue (ACT / AutoExpreso / Metropistas PR-22/PR-5) from ACT audited financials and EMMA toll-revenue-bond disclosures. Dropzone reader; pursue finer (per-plaza) breakdowns via FOIA.
Aggregate transit farebox revenue (AMA buses + Tren Urbano / ATI) from audited financials and budgets.
Aggregate port/airport fee revenue (PR Ports Authority + Aerostar/SJU) from audited financials and EMMA disclosures.
Aggregate PRASA water/sewer rate revenue from audited financials, rate-case filings, and EMMA disclosures. Shares scripts/ingest_utility_revenue.py with prepa_luma_rate_revenue.
Aggregate PREPA/LUMA power rate revenue from audited financials and EMMA legacy revenue-bond disclosures. Shares scripts/ingest_utility_revenue.py with prasa_rate_revenue.
DTOP/ACT permanent road construction & maintenance contracts (rolling, beyond the 2020 transition snapshot). OCPR registry agency code 032.
PR Ports Authority / Aerostar contracts and capital projects. Also fed by scripts/parse_aaa_ports_pdf.py from the acquired completed_projects_AAA.pdf.
AMA / Tren Urbano (ATI) operating and O&M contracts.
